title: phleum paniculatum subsp. annuum
intro: Phleum paniculatum subsp. annuum, also known as annual timothy grass, is a type of plant that belongs to the grass family and is native to Europe. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Phleum paniculatum subsp. annuum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support respiratory health. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, teas, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
